name: vanlife
description: cozy live tracker for van life adventures 🚐💕

scripts.dev: wrangler d1 execute vanlife --local --file=schema.sql && wrangler dev
scripts.deploy: wrangler d1 execute vanlife --remote --file=schema.sql -y && wrangler deploy
scripts.seed: node scripts/make-seed.mjs && wrangler d1 execute vanlife --local --file=scripts/seed.sql
